item.title: Research the SSL handshake in detail and make notes on the details of the messages passed and their sequence
item.dc:creator: Annoymous Dev
item.description: I have a PowerPoint slide, which will be presented all about SSL handshake. Click this link if you cannot watch
item.content:encoded:
I have a PowerPoint slide, which will be presented all about SSL handshake.

Click this link if you cannot watch

item.title: Research a commercial provider of digital signatures available
item.dc:creator: Annoymous Dev
item.description: I will research VNPT – one of the famous commercial providers of digital signatures in Vietnam The file types that can be signed Price VNPT -CA service packages Registration deadline(months) Total price package Organization ID Standard 1024 bit 12  1.273.000 Organization ID Standard 1024 bit 24 2.190.000 Organization ID Standard 1024 bit 36 3.112.000 digital […]
item.content:encoded:
I will research VNPT – one of the famous commercial providers of digital signatures in Vietnam

The file types that can be signed

  • .docx(word), .pdf, .xls(excel), .pptx(Powerpoint)
  • mostly file types (except .docx, .pptx, .xls) need to convert to .pdf to sign.

Price

References

  • Hướng Dẫn Ký Số SmartCA VNPT – VNPT Business (vnpthcmc.com) Vietnamese website
  • Bảng giá chữ ký số VNPT-CA (vnpteinvoice.vn) – There will be more price for organization and individual.

item.title: Research Internet Key Exchange (IKE) as used in IPSec and note its purpose and key features.
item.dc:creator: Annoymous Dev
item.description: This post is giving you the details of research, purpose, and key features in Internet Key exchange (IKE). Overview Key features Purpose References
item.content:encoded:
This post is giving you the details of research, purpose, and key features in Internet Key exchange (IKE).

Overview

  • In computing, Internet Key Exchange (IKE, sometimes IKEv1 or IKEv2, depending on version) is the protocol used to set up a security association (SA) in the IPsec protocol suite.

Key features

  • Auto create a new key
  • Protecting on attacks which block the circuit like DDos (Denial-of-service attack)
  • Using digital key
  • Using the same key
  • Providing means for both partners to agree on protocols, algorithms, and keys to use.
  • Make sure the key exchange goes to the right user
  • Managing keys after being accpeted
  • Allow dynamic endorsement between peer objects.

Purpose

  • Internet key exchanged uses to set up a secure, authenticated communications channel between two devices.
  • During key exchange, IKE uses a symmetric encryption algorithm, these keys will be changed over time -> limit the cracking status of attackers

References

  • Introduction to IKE: Internet Key Exchange | Junos OS | Juniper Networks
  • Internet Key Exchange – Wikipedia
  • Giao thức Internet Key Exchange (IKE) trong VPN – (vnpro.vn) – Vietnamese website
